configuration_management.description: Tools for managing Desktop Commander server configuration and settings

file_editing.description: Tools for making surgical edits to various file formats

tools.mcp_desktop_commander_edit_block: Edit a block of text in a file

file_operations.description: Tools for reading, writing, and manipulating files and directories

tools.mcp_desktop_commander_read_file: Read complete contents of a file
tools.mcp_desktop_commander_read_multiple_file: Read contents of multiple files at once
tools.mcp_desktop_commander_write_file: Create or overwrite a file with content
tools.mcp_desktop_commander_write_pdf: Write content to a PDF file
tools.mcp_desktop_commander_move_file: Move or rename a file or directory

file_search.description: Tools for searching files and content with streaming and pagination

tools.mcp_desktop_commander_get_more_search_re: Get next page of search results

process_management.description: Tools for running, interacting with, and managing terminal processes

tools.mcp_desktop_commander_read_process_outpu: Read output from a running process
tools.mcp_desktop_commander_interact_with_proc: Send input to a running process

system_monitoring.description: Tools for monitoring system usage, statistics, and tool history

user_interaction.description: Tools for user feedback and onboarding prompts
